LanguageData.CloserVEQuests.AncientSiloDistanceDescri: Configure the valid world-tile distance range for Ancient Silo quest sites.
LanguageData.CloserVEQuests.AncientIcbmLaunchSiteDist: Configure the valid world-tile distance range for Ancient ICBM Launch Site quest sites.
LanguageData.CloserVEQuests.AncientIcbmLaunchSiteMinD: Ancient ICBM Launch Site min distance: {0}
LanguageData.CloserVEQuests.AncientIcbmLaunchSiteMaxD: Ancient ICBM Launch Site max distance: {0}
LanguageData.CloserVEQuests.GeneratorSiteDistanceNote: These distance settings apply to all site quests that inherit The Generator's shared site node.
LanguageData.CloserVEQuests.CryptoforgeSiteDistanceNo: These distance settings apply to all site quests that inherit Cryptoforge's shared site node. Cryptoforge sites can only spawn in Ice Sheet, Sea Ice, Tundra, or Boreal Forest, so the default range may block the quest if your colony is not near those biomes.
